stops.title: 🏨 Fusion Original Saigon Centre
notes: Drop luggage and settle in.
🕘 24 Hours
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Next: walk / Grab to Phở SOL — approx. 8–10 min walk or 3 min Grab.

stops.title: 🍜 Phở SOL
notes: 石鍋牛肉河粉，第一餐。約 150k–200k VND/人。
🕘 出發前再確認
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Next: Grab to Central Post Office — approx. 5 min / ~40k–60k VND.

stops.title: 📮 Post Office · ⛪ Cathedral · 📚 Book Street
notes: 法式郵局、紅教堂、書街，第一日下午輕鬆散步。
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Next: Grab to The Cafe Apartments / Nhà Suga — approx. 5 min / ~40k–60k VND.

stops.title: 💆 Spa Nhà Suga Premium
notes: 韓式 head spa，落機後 reset。
🕘 出發前再確認
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Next: Grab to Omakase Tiger — approx. 15 min / ~60k–90k VND.

stops.title: 🍣 Omakase Tiger
notes: 首晚日落 Omakase，建議提早訂位。
🕘 Tue–Sun 17:30 / 20:00；Monday closed
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Next: Grab to Nguyễn Huệ / The Cafe Apartments night photo — approx. 15–20 min / ~60k–90k VND.

stops.title: 🌃 The Cafe Apartments
notes: Optional night photo stop。
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Next: walk back to hotel — approx. 5 min.

stops.title: 🍚 Cơm Tấm Mộc - Lý Tự Trọng
notes: 在地特色早餐 · 老字號碎米飯，先試一口地道早餐再去 Cooking Class。
📍 Lý Tự Trọng 街，距酒店步行約 8 分鐘
⭐ 必點：炭烤厚切豬排碎米飯（Cơm Tấm Sườn）；4 人點 2–3 份分食。
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Cơm Tấm Mộc → Saigon Cooking Class：Grab 約 5 分鐘 ／ ~40,000–60,000 VND。

stops.title: 👩🏻‍🍳 Saigon Cooking Class
notes: 濱城市場導覽 + 散步廚藝課，完成後即場午餐。
📍 39B Trần Cao Vân, Phường Đa Kao, Quận 1
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Cooking Class → Mộc Kim Spa & Beauty：Grab 約 10–12 分鐘。

stops.title: 🌿 Mộc Kim Spa & Beauty
notes: 經典放鬆療程，讓身心徹底舒緩。
📍 143 Lê Thị Hồng Gấm, Phường Nguyễn Thái Bình, Quận 1
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Spa → LIBÉ：Grab 約 10 分鐘，開始 Nguyễn Trãi shopping flow。

stops.title: 🛍 Shopping Flow
notes: 精品小店、設計師品牌、潮流選物店。時間夠就慢慢行，唔夠就 skip optional。
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To dinner
Vincom / The New Playground → LÚNE：Grab 約 5 分鐘。

stops.title: 🍷 LÚNE Restaurant & Bar
notes: Shopping 後直接去的法式／現代越式晚餐。
📍 17/14 Lê Thánh Tôn, Bến Nghé, Quận 1
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To hotel
Dinner 後按體力決定 Grab / walk 回 Fusion；Grab 約 5 分鐘。

stops.title: 🦀 Quán Thuý 94
notes: 蟹肉粉絲早餐，順路去粉紅教堂。
🕘 出發前再確認；早餐/午餐較合適
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
Next: walk to Pink Church / Cộng Cà Phê — approx. 5 min.

stops.title: 🌸 Tân Định Church · ☕ Cộng Cà Phê
notes: 粉紅教堂打卡，對面咖啡休息。
🕘 外觀打卡；內部開放情況出發前確認
stops.routeHint:
🚕 To next stop
